rules.description: Do not use the old scene-token constant name for the character-select hub.
Do not use the old legacy scene-token constant name for the character-select hub.
Use gameplay semantics for Boss Rush return methods.
Use gameplay semantics for Boss Rush return helpers.
Do not name character-select hub checks as Breach checks in runtime code.
Scene-token comparisons should be named as character-select scene checks.
Run lifecycle reset kinds should use character-select hub terminology.
Boss Rush state names should use character-select terminology.
